prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ad3b40cf`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: the full `1` line is the mirror axis, which can be vertical, horizontal, main diagonal, or counterdiagonal. Among the remaining non-background colors, only the unique least-populated color class is reflected across that axis, and mirrored cells are added only onto background.

Both summary hints were discarded and corrected in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/notes.md). Sonnet incorrectly says all foreground colors reflect; Opus is closer but still wrong because the selector is not the “smallest shape”, it is the least-populated foreground color partition. No new reusable primitive was needed; task-local helpers were enough.

Implemented files: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/helpers.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ad3b40cf/notes.md).

Verification and artifacts are complete: official examples passed `4/4`, generated examples passed `1000/1000`, and the rebuilt dataset includes all four axis orientations. Outputs are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ad3b40cf/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ad3b40cf/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ad3b40cf/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ad3b40cf/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ad3b40cf/previews/preview_03.png).
